arrival.title: Arrival at Nexus City
arrival.text: Your ship settles into the Docking Quarter with a tired groan. Whatever you were running from, it's behind you now. The debt, though — that came with you.

lumen_festival.title: The Lumen Festival
lumen_festival.text: The Bloom District ignites for the Lumen Festival. For one night the whole city drifts toward the gardens and the dark feels a little further off.

vael_naming_day.title: Vael's Naming Day
vael_naming_day.text: You overhear it's Vael's naming day. "Soldiers don't mark the years," she'd say — but she'd remember who did.

debt_reminder.title: A Reminder
debt_reminder.text: A courier drone finds you in a crowd and won't leave until you take the message. No words — just a number, and how much of the year is already gone.
